expectations.evidence: Missing next_phase, suppliers_to_skip, estimated_value fields. suppliers_to_include is array of objects instead of ICO strings. Has non-schema 'next_steps' field.
Rationale mentions '2 DANGER, 5 WARNING, 5 INFO' and names both suppliers with risk flags.
suppliers_to_include has both ICOs (55002072, 36835463) though as nested objects instead of strings.
